name: canDisturbanceFrameTrigger::SetMessage
title: canDisturbanceFrameTrigger::SetMessage
syntax: long canDisturbanceFrameTrigger::SetMessage(message msg, dword deviceID, dword validityMask);
description: Sets the frame for the trigger condition. The mask is filled automatically with the data of the frame. The used data can be configured with the validity mask.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: The frame data that should be used for the frame trigger.
